message:
Running command: 
# Understand what's inside compute_ss - what modules it instantiates
grep -E "^\s+\w+ (u_|i_)" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.v | awk '{print $1}' | sort -u

echo "==="
# Check filelist for synthesis
cat /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/filelists/*.f 2>/dev/null | head -60
echo "==="
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/filelists/ 2>/dev/null
